scripts.build: npm run build -w @narrarium/core && npm run build -w @narrarium/mcp-server && npm run build -w @narrarium/create-book && npm run build -w @narrarium/astro-reader
scripts.pack:all: npm pack --dry-run -w @narrarium/core && npm pack --dry-run -w @narrarium/mcp-server && npm pack --dry-run -w @narrarium/astro-reader && npm pack --dry-run -w @narrarium/create-book
scripts.release:check: npm run build && npm run validate && npm run test && npm run pack:all
scripts.test: npm run test -w @narrarium/core && npm run test -w @narrarium/mcp-server && npm run test -w @narrarium/astro-reader
